steps.title: Make collection control agreement
steps.content: In the relative clause, the subject is the singular noun "collection." The long phrase about artworks and artists only modifies that subject and does not make it plural.

steps.title: Reject plural verbs
steps.content: Choices A, C, and D all use plural verb forms, so they incorrectly agree with nearby plural nouns instead of the singular subject "collection." The remaining verb is singular and fits the subject-verb agreement requirement. The answer is B.
